question: Model a `Library` class that manages a collection of `Book` objects (from Q1) using a simple array or vector (without using STL directly for management, just as storage). Implement methods to add a book and display all books.

test_cases.input: Adding 5 books, then displaying. Testing copy constructor and assignment operator.
test_cases.expected:
Adding: The Lord of the Rings
Adding: Pride and Prejudice
Adding: Moby Dick
Adding: War and Peace
Adding: The Catcher in the Rye
--- Library Books (Count: 5, Capacity: 8) ---
Title: The Lord of the Rings, Author: J.R.R. Tolkien, Year: 1954
Title: Pride and Prejudice, Author: Jane Austen, Year: 1813
Title: Moby Dick, Author: Herman Melville, Year: 1851
Title: War and Peace, Author: Leo Tolstoy, Year: 1869
Title: The Catcher in the Rye, Author: J.D. Salinger, Year: 1951
----------------------------------------------------
